name: year split with multiple rate type with statements

pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" where NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t107f5905edf79f4540d27f4c7967ba90.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_affbf7bd5da5.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t107f5905edf79f4540d27f4c7967ba90.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_1, "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."year", "player"."pos" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."pid" left join "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."year" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_affbf7bd5da5" on "rate_aggregate_affbf7bd5da5"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rate_aggregate_affbf7bd5da5"."year" = "player_years"."year" where "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."scoring_format_hash" = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' and player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."points_per_game", "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."year", "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST,
